scripts.build:wasm: cd crates/convolve-core && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../packages/convolve-wasm/src/wasm --out-name convolve_core
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build -w @agunal/convolve-wasm && npm run build -w @agunal/convolve-demo
scripts.test:ts: npm run build:wasm && npm run build -w @agunal/convolve-wasm && npm run test -w @agunal/convolve-wasm
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:ts
scripts.check: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && npm run test && npm run build
